case_title: MARILYN DABI VS. LEZLY MARTINEZ AGUILAR

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,700.00 FILED BY DABI, MARILYN AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ AGUILAR, LEZLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40. SERVED DEC-28-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO PLAINTIFF DABI, MARILYN
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO LEZLY MARTINEZ AGUILAR [FOR JULY-10-2023 OEX HEARING AT 11:00 AM]
ORDER OF CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF MARILYN DABI IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT INTERPRETER CAROLINE CARRERA. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STIPULATED TO HAVE HER CASE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2023 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ AGUILAR, LEZLY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DABI, MARILYN AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ AGUILAR, LEZLY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-14-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ AGUILAR, LEZLY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED DEC-28-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ AGUILAR, LEZLY

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT. THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/ JUDGMENT CREDITOR MARILYN DABI IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED TAGALOG INTERPRETER CAROLINE CARRERA (#301298). DEFENDANT/ JUDGMENT DEBTOR LAZLY MARTINEZ AGUILAR IS PRESENT. PARTIES CONDUCTED THE EXAMINATION IN COURT HALLWAY, JUDGMENT CREDITOR RETURNS TO THE COURTROOM WITH A COMPLETED SC-133 (JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S STATEMENT OF ASSETS) FORM COMPLETED BY THE JUDGEMENT DEBTOR AND INFORMS THE COURT THAT THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR DOES NOT HAVE ANY ASSET INFORMATION TO PROVIDE. HONORABLE JUDGE HARRY L. JACOBS ADDRESSES PARTIES' QUESTIONS ON THE BENCH. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: HARRY L. JACOBS; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-10-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARILYN DABI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LEZLY MARTINEZ AGUILAR IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ AGUILAR, LEZLY HEARING SET FOR JUL-10-2023 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SMALL CLAIMS SUBPOENA AND DECLARATION SERVICE FEE $40. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DABI, MARILYN SERVED JUN-01-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ AGUILAR, LEZLY

PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION AND ORDER TO PRODUCE STATEMENT OF ASSETS AND TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION SERVICE FEE $40. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DABI, MARILYN SERVED JUN-06-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ AGUILAR, LEZLY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DABI, MARILYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ AGUILAR, LEZLY $4,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,790.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
